chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1528 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case (Priority) 1.For orders on o/objections 2.For hearing of CMA 6113/22 3.For hearing of main case 09-09-2025 Mr. Daim Ali Bhanbhro, Advocate for the respondent No.3. Syed Naveed Ali Shah, D.A.G. **** Mr. Sundar Khan Chachar, Advocate holds brief on behalf of Mr. Shafquat Rahim Rajput, counsel for the petitioners and under his instructions does not press instant petition, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed along with listed application(s). JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
